tools.name: Muddler
tools.description: Infuse up to 2 cards (+40 Flavor when scored).
tools.art_prompt: a plain thick wooden cocktail muddler pestle with a rounded pounding end, standing upright, isolated object alone on a plain dark background, no hands, no drink, no glass, no table, no flame

tools.name: Jigger
tools.description: Turn a card Overproof (+4 Mult when scored).
tools.art_prompt: a polished double-sided brass jigger measure

tools.name: Ice Pick
tools.art_prompt: a steel bar ice pick with a worn wooden handle

tools.name: Citrus Press
tools.description: Convert up to 3 cards to Sour.
tools.art_prompt: a bright stainless steel two-handled handheld citrus juicer squeezer, closed, held upright, isolated object alone on a plain dark background, no hands, no drink, no glass, no table, no flame

tools.name: Bar Spoon
tools.art_prompt: a long spiral-handled brass bar spoon

tools.name: Coupe Glass
tools.description: Turn a card Premium: it counts as any type in recipes.
tools.art_prompt: an elegant empty crystal coupe glass catching warm light

tools.name: Ice Tray
tools.description: Freeze up to 2 cards: x2 Mult when scored, but 1-in-4 chance to shatter.
tools.art_prompt: a frosted metal ice cube tray with a few clear cubes

tools.name: Double Strainer
tools.description: Double a card: each time it scores, a plain copy joins your deck for good.
tools.art_prompt: a metal spring-coil hawthorne cocktail strainer disc with a handle, laid flat, isolated object alone on a plain dark background, no hands, no drink, no glass, no table, no flame

tools.name: Gold Rim
tools.description: Gild a card: +$3 if it sits unplayed on the rail when the customer is satisfied.
tools.art_prompt: a small dish of gold sugar with a coupe glass rim being dipped, golden sparkle

tools.name: Cocktail Umbrella
tools.description: Make a card Signature quality: x1.5 Mult when scored.
tools.art_prompt: a single small open paper cocktail parasol umbrella in warm amber and pink, isolated object alone on a plain dark background, no hands, no drink, no glass, no table, no flame

tools.name: Bottle Opener
tools.description: Recreate the last Tool you used this run.
tools.art_prompt: a worn brass wall-mounted bottle opener

tools.name: Tab Ledger
tools.art_prompt: a small leather bar tab ledger book with a fountain pen and a few coins

tools.name: Soda Gun
tools.description: Convert up to 2 cards to Bubbly.
tools.art_prompt: a chrome bar soda gun dispenser with a coiled hose

tools.name: Paring Knife
tools.description: Convert up to 2 cards to Garnish.
tools.art_prompt: a small sharp paring knife beside a curl of citrus peel

tools.name: Bitters Bottle
tools.description: Convert up to 2 cards to Bitter.
tools.art_prompt: a small dasher bottle of dark aromatic bitters, blank neck wrap, no text

tools.name: Muddling Stick
tools.description: Raise the value of up to 2 cards by +1 (for House Special and Layered Pour).
tools.art_prompt: a slender wooden muddling stick with a rounded end
